falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish structure, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 15 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sustained decline in volatility would suggest market complacency and lack of panic selling, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implied urgency.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This policy shift would inject liquidity and reverse the pattern's implied tightening cycle, falsifying the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
